menu.empty: This menu is being prepared. Check back soon!
menu.pepsi_ask: Ask your server about our Pepsi drink selection

landing.tagline: The Future of Restaurant Menus, Powered by Pepsi
landing.subtitle: Give every restaurant a beautiful, branded digital menu that customers can access with a single scan. No app downloads. No printing costs. Just effortless dining — with Pepsi at the center.
landing.three_steps_desc: From partnership to plate, DineQR makes it effortless to bring Pepsi-branded digital menus to any restaurant.
landing.step1_desc: Pepsi identifies restaurant partners and onboards them into the DineQR platform with a dedicated account and branding.
landing.step2_desc: Each restaurant gets a fully customized, mobile-first digital menu featuring Pepsi branding — ready to go in minutes.
landing.step3_desc: Diners scan a QR code at their table and instantly see a beautiful, branded menu — no app needed, works on any phone.
landing.everything_desc: DineQR is a full-featured platform built for scale, designed to delight customers and empower restaurant operators.
landing.feat_qr_desc: Generate unique QR codes for every restaurant. Customers scan with any phone camera — no app needed.
landing.feat_brand_desc: Every menu showcases the Pepsi brand with logos, colors, and a premium footer — elevating brand impressions per visit.
landing.feat_realtime_desc: Restaurants update their menu from the admin panel and changes appear instantly — no reprinting, no waiting.
landing.feat_multi_desc: Manage dozens — or hundreds — of restaurants from a single dashboard. Perfect for franchise and chain operations.
landing.feat_mobile_desc: Menus are built for phones first. Buttery-smooth scrolling, gorgeous typography, and blazing-fast load times.
landing.feat_roles_desc: Admins, managers, and staff each have tailored access levels. Full control for operators, simplicity for front-line staff.
landing.demo_desc: Click any restaurant below to open its live digital menu — exactly what customers see when they scan the QR code at the table.
landing.no_demo: No demo restaurants available right now.
landing.why_desc: DineQR eliminates the pain of printed menus while giving your restaurant a premium, tech-forward image — all backed by the power and recognition of the Pepsi brand.
landing.benefit_print_desc: Never pay for menu reprints again. Update prices, descriptions, and seasonal specials in real time.
landing.benefit_instant_desc: Add a new dish? 86 an item? Changes go live the moment you hit save — no delays, no stale menus.
landing.benefit_brand_desc: Align your restaurant with one of the world's most recognized brands. Pepsi branding builds trust and elevates perception.
landing.benefit_analytics_desc: Understand which items get the most views, track peak browsing hours, and make data-driven menu decisions.
landing.cta_desc: Join the DineQR platform and bring Pepsi-branded digital menus to restaurants everywhere.
landing.copyright: 2026 DineQR. Powered by Pepsi. All rights reserved.
